_note: target_acos is a percentage value, e.g. 20 means 20%.

wasted_spend._note: Uses the account's actual conversion rate to require statistical confidence before cutting a 0-order keyword, instead of a flat spend multiple.

history_rules._note: Reads past logs/changes_*.csv so a new batch doesn't fight the previous one. Cooldown blocks re-touching a keyword too soon; reversal protection blocks flipping direction without enough fresh data. Extreme-tier signals bypass both.
